steps.title: Determine what the claim demands
steps.content: The student's claim is that Catlett unified “various artistic traditions and styles.” The strongest evidence would explicitly name multiple distinct artistic sources combined together.

steps.title: Find the evidence of unification
steps.content:
A explicitly combines three distinct artistic traditions—ancient Indigenous sculpting, modern Mexican muralism, and German artist Kathe Kollwitz—in a single work.

B, C, and D address techniques, biographical details, or subject matter without showing multiple traditions being unified.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
